productDisplayName: Biotique Women Bio Sandalwood SPF 50 Sunscreen
description: Sandalwood comes from the sandal tree native to India, and used throughout the ages for its pampering and protecting properties. This nutrient rich lotion is blended with pure sandalwood, saffron, wheatgerm, honey and bark of arjun tree to keep skin soft, fair and moisturised. It protects skin with broad spectrum SPF50 UVA/UVB sunscreen. This product is very water resistant and retains SPF after 80 minutes in the water.Skin Type- For all skin typesUsage- Apply liberally before sun exposure. Helps reduce risk of skin ageing, skin cancer and other harmful rays of the sun
